race.comment: AEROPOWER (7) debuted a month ago beaten 2.25 lengths over 800m at this track. Will improve and on what we've seen she will take plenty of beating. THRILL SEEKER (8) was beaten 4L at long odds in the same contest. She's led them up narrowly beaten over 860m at Gatton prior and has the winkers on for the first time. Maps well and following a brief freshen she can go a lot better. ALMOND GOLD (1) resumes and the market suggests she's pleasing and will race sharply. Has a low gate and a handy 3kg and will get every chance. JADA ROSE (6) debuts and she profiles well. Keep an eye on the betting moves.
